title: [Skyship, Core]
description: Intense heat radiates from the machinery lining the area's bulkheads, causing the air to ripple and waver.  A pale blue smoke filters through gaps in the floor, originating from the massive gear-lined devices that are visible in cavernous space beneath the walkway.  A wide and flat brazier hangs above the walkway via a series of chains, the fire within it casting a spiderweb of soft orange light across the metal ceiling.
